channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: PIA and Other Pakistani Airlines Increase Fuel Surcharges Due to Gulf Conflict
item.description: Pakistani airlines, including the national carrier Pakistan International Airlines (PIA), have increased fuel surcharges following the ongoing conflict in the Gulf region, which has disrupted air rout...

item.title: Kerala Chief Minister highlights communal harmony as the state's key strength
item.description: Kerala Chief Minister Pinarayi Vijayan has emphasised that the real narrative of Kerala is reflected in the state's longstanding tradition of communal harmony and social cohesion. Speaking to NDTV, he...

item.title: COSTECH, in partnership with Sahara Ventures, starts program to support 1,000 youth startups over four years
item.description: Dar es Salaam – The National Commission for Science and Technology (COSTECH) has officially rolled out a nationwide initiative to fast-track the growth of youth-led startups and strengthen Tanzania's ...

item.title: Carlton dominates Richmond as young Tiger faces potential ban
item.description: Carlton Blues are asserting control over Richmond Tigers in the AFL clash at the MCG, leading by 27 points at half-time and maintaining a strong advantage deep into the third quarter. Sam Lalor and Sa...

item.title: Senate urges executive to prepare national contingency plan amid global tensions
item.description: The Philippine Senate has unanimously passed a resolution urging the executive branch to create and submit a comprehensive national contingency plan within 15 days, in response to rising tensions in t...

item.title: Chinese AI Education Firm YBC Appointed First Rotating Coordinator of New BRICS Youth AI Education Alliance
item.description: Recently, the Founding Conference of the BRICS Youth Education Alliance of Artificial Intelligence took place for Beijing, China. YBC, one big player in China's AI education sector, was invited by the...

item.title: Amber Davies temporarily steps back from Legally Blonde due to illness, understudy Hannah Lowther covers role
item.description: Amber Davies, known for her appearances on Love Island and Strictly Come Dancing, was compelled to leave a performance of the West End musical Legally Blonde due to illness. Suffering from burn-out an...

item.title: Pelicans defeat Raptors 122-111 with strong performances from Murphy and Murray during Ingram’s return
item.description: The New Orleans Pelicans secured a 122-111 victory over the Toronto Raptors in a game highlighted by standout performances from Murphy and Murray. The match also marked the return of Brandon Ingram to...

item.title: Nova Scotia family speaks out after fatal crash claims three lives and driver receives 4½-year sentence
item.description: Adam Gabriel of Nova Scotia continues to grapple with the devastating loss of three family members in a 2023 crash caused by Tyler Strong, who was driving at speeds estimated between 149 km/h and 168 ...

item.title: UK police set security measures for Tinubu’s official visit to King Charles III at Windsor Castle
item.description: Authorities for the United Kingdom don talk say dem go close some roads and restrict airspace around Windsor ahead of Nigerian President Bola Ahmed Tinubu’s state visit wey go happen on March 18. E go...

item.title: Trump Claims US Achieved Military Success in Iran Conflict
item.description: President Donald Trump don yan say United States don win dia military showdown with Iran, claiming say Iran no expect di kind level of attacks wey American military carry out. According to Trump, Iran...

item.title: Union Minister Hardeep Puri assures stability of India’s crude oil supply despite Middle East tensions
item.description: Union Minister Hardeep Puri has reassured that India’s crude oil supply remains stable despite rising geopolitical tensions in the Middle East, particularly around the Strait of Hormuz amid the Iran-I...

item.title: GFiber and Astound Broadband Announce Merger Backed by Stonepeak
item.description: GFiber, formerly known as Google Fiber, and Astound Broadband have announced plans to merge in a deal supported by infrastructure investor Stonepeak Infrastructure Partners. Under the agreement, Stone...

item.title: LPDC Clears Ben Kalu of Allegations Amid Political Attacks
item.description: Naija politics dey always get one kind pattern whenever person begin dey rise for public eye. Dis one dey happen now for Deputy Speaker of House of Representatives, Rt. Hon. Benjamin Okezie Kalu. Rece...

item.title: Shashi Tharoor Condemns Attack on Thai Cargo Ship Bound for India by Iran
item.description: On Wednesday, a Thai cargo ship named Mayuree Naree, en route to Gujarat's Kandla port with Indian crew members onboard, was attacked by Iran while navigating through the Strait of Hormuz. The attack ...

item.title: Kerry 2026 Taste Charts Highlight Changing African Food Preferences
item.description: Kerry, the global leader in taste and nutrition, imefanya launch ya Kerry 2026 taste charts, ikionyesha mabadiliko makubwa kwenye preferences za flavour za wateja barani Africa. Ripoti hizi zinashughu...

item.title: Islamabad High Court directs medical board to assess Imran Khan’s eye condition
item.description: ISLAMABAD: The Islamabad High Court (IHC) on Thursday directed the formation of a medical board to evaluate former Prime Minister Imran Khan’s health, specifically concerning his retinal condition. Th...

item.title: Congress Approves New Schedule for BARMM Elections; Comelec to Begin Preparations
item.description: The Office of the Presidential Adviser on Peace, Reconciliation and Unity (OPAPRU) has expressed support following Congress’ approval of bills postponing the first-ever Bangsamoro Autonomous Region in...

item.title: Memorable and Bold Fashion Moments on the Oscars Red Carpet
item.description: The Oscars are renowned for celebrating excellence in film, but the red carpet preceding the ceremony is a showcase of celebrity fashion daring and creativity. From Bjork's famous swan dress to Celine...

item.title: Federal government acts to stabilise fuel supply amid shortages
item.description: In response to ongoing panic buying and fuel shortages across Australia, the federal government has implemented additional measures to ensure domestic fuel supplies remain stable. The moves come as mo...
